MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE

Mtn To Reclassify
Off Calendar Dec-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kyle Pineo, Esq. 925-838-2090 of Berding & Weil for Plaintiff.
James Fahey 415-845-6507 Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant Argues fees. Plaintiff argues and cites statute.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JAMES FAHEY's Motion To Reclassify.

Defendant's motion to reclassify is denied. The amount plaintiff alleges exceeds the jurisdictional limit of small claims court, and no other good cause exists to support the motion to reclassify. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Andrew Cheng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR# 6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/AC)
